arabic_text: نفس حسیۃ + علم و عمل = صورت
english_text: Sensible Soul + Knowledge and Action = Form
alt_text: An equation-style diagram: 'نفس حسیۃ' (Sensible Soul) plus 'علم و عمل' (Knowledge and Action) equals 'صورت' (Form) — defining how the sensible soul, combined with knowledge and action, constitutes form.
notes: Equation-style teaching aid. Pairs with image 001 which gives the equation for the rational soul. Together they articulate the relation between the two soul types and Form.
